title: broadcast_to_group: members.contains is O(M) per connected client
description: state.rs:207 — broadcast_to_group() iterates all connected clients and calls members.contains(&pub_id) which is O(M) (vec linear scan) for each of the C connected clients, making the whole fan-out O(C*M). With C=10,000 connected clients and M=100 group members, each GROUP_SEND does ~1M string comparisons before any sends. Fix: convert members to a HashSet before the outer iteration, making the contains check O(1) and the total fan-out O(C+M).
